<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Image\Encoders; use Intervention\Image\Drivers\SpecializableEncoder; class WebpEncoder extends SpecializableEncoder { /** * Create new encoder object * * @param null|bool $strip Strip EXIF metadata * @return void */ public function __construct( public int $quality = self::DEFAULT_QUALITY, public ?bool $strip = null ) { // } }
